title: Kyoko Suiri (In Spectre)
description: Kyoko Suiri (In Spectre) is a RPG Modpack for players interested in spirits based on feudal japan.
body:
![Kyoko Suiri (In Spectre) SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qCnrvb4j/images/bde972a48b7c0b689df0e4b80f03f95bcbfb38ff.png)
# Overview
**Kyoko Suiri (In Spectre)** is a modpack that draws inspiration from the In/Spectre anime and manga, bringing it from the present into a feudal styled Japan. Enjoy a vibrant world filled with yokai and spirits, explore the various feudal themed structures spaced across the land. Journey through feudal Japan, collecting armour, weapons, foods and more, while exploring a uniquely generated world filled to the brim with different yokai and spirits in all dimensions!

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/kyoko-suiri)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kyoko-suiri)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/H_2-wvdkvS8?si=VR-Lemj-BHXWj969" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features
- [✔️] **Lets Get Fancy** - Fresh animations for players and mobs, enjoy a overhauled visual experience.
- [✔️] **World Generation** - Bamboo groves, bushier medows and winding paths, why put down roots when the world awaits!
- [✔️] **Structures** - From small shrines to massive mansions, its a big world worthy of exploration and adventure!
- [✔️] **Yokai & Spirits** - A completely overhauled vanilla system, enjoy 40+ new mob looks styled after various yokai and spirits.

### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
